{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Prince Rellask's wand
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Prince Rellask]] uses a wand made of gold-plated bone.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7">''The Pilot'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
